ideation: This animation sequence will depict a robot carefully placing its feet, one after the other, as if walking softly. It will emphasize a gentle, measured progression, rather than a quick stride.  The robot's arms will move in a complementary way, subtly shifting to maintain balance with each step.  The arms will not be the primary focus, but they will enhance the overall impression of measured movement. Frame 1: Both arms are slightly extended forward, palms down, as if maintaining balance while preparing to take a first step. Frame 2: The left arm moves slightly back to maintain balance as the robot's weight shifts to the right leg. The right arm extends forward even more. Frame 3: Both arms return to a slightly forward position, palms down, as the robot's weight centers after the first step. Frame 4: The right arm moves slightly back as the robot shifts weight to the left leg. The left arm extends forward more. Frame 5: Both arms return to their starting position. The entire sequence will show a slow, deliberate, and careful movement.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, palms down, ready to step
left arm swings back, right arm reaches forward
arms center, weight shifts forward onto the step
right arm swings back, left arm reaches forward
arms return to starting balance, step completed
